case_title: YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. VS. AMIT RAMESH VIJAN

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT VIJAN, AMIT RAMESH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-08-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-08-2008 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAY-29-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT VIJAN, AMIT RAMESH

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-29-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-29-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MARK P. SCHREIBER. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-29-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VIJAN, AMIT RAMESH $1,715.60 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,815.60, THE COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF'S TOTAL DAMAGES TO BE $4289.99 AND ATTRIBUTES 60% OF THE FAULT FOR THE ACCIDENT TO PLAINTIFF FOR A NET TOTAL OF $1715.60 PLUS COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-02-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE - $89.00) SERVED MAR-12-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VIJAN, AMIT RAMESH
